title: Auto Tree
body:
# Info
This is a simple datapack that plants saplings dropped by trees on the ground automatically, so you don't have to. You can also drop them manually on the ground and watch them get planted.

# Setup
No setup is required; just download and drop this datapack in your world's "datapacks" folder.

## Demo Video 
Not sure what I am talking about? You can watch the demo video:
- [Click here for a demo video](https://streamable.com/l1nq1c) (Video from version 0.2-BETA)
  - If it doesn't load try reloading the page (Streamable issues :( )

*Thanks for 4000 downloads.*
